loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate event counts and worst-case feeder stats; per-phase THD columns (thd_current_*, thd_voltage_*) are not present on the panel stub table, so the roster aggregates feeder-level data from the outgoing members.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations from member meters; sag/swell/current/neutral event columns are not present in the panel's own schema, so event series are unbound.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing AI narrative text — no live numeric data columns are measured for this panel's own table; the narrative is generated from sibling cards' computed fleet PQ numbers.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder PQ metrics (iThd, vThd, kW, PF) from member meters; 3rd harmonic, peak-THD, k-factor, and driver diagnosis are not measured by these UPS/BPDB meters.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing harmonic distribution (H5, H7, I-THD, V-THD) and active power (kw) for the panel's outgoing feeders. 3rd harmonic (H3), K-factor, and peak-THD are not measured by these member meters and are omitted.
